common.searchProducts: Search products by name, SKU, or barcode

hero.title: Run Your Business Without Chaos
hero.description: Stop juggling bills, stock, and payments across notebooks, spreadsheets, and WhatsApp. BillSutra gives you one calm system to bill faster, protect cash flow, and cut daily stress.
hero.urgency: Switch today before another day slips into manual chaos
hero.microNote: No credit card required. Setup takes minutes.
hero.miniCardValue: See sales, collections, and stock without waiting for someone to prepare reports.
hero.miniCardTwoValue: Know what needs attention before missed payments and stockouts snowball.
hero.previewSubtitle: Dashboard, billing, inventory, and AI guidance in one operating system
hero.flowOneDescription: Team followed up on a pending invoice before it turned overdue.
hero.flowTwoDescription: Restock was suggested before the fast-moving shelf went empty.
hero.flowThreeDescription: Owner can review profit, pending collections, and best sellers in minutes.
hero.aiInsightDescription: Pending collections are rising in two customer accounts. Follow up now and protect this week's cash.

problem.title: Manual ops quietly drain time, cash, and confidence
problem.description: When billing, inventory, and reports live in different places, the team stays reactive. Mistakes pile up, follow-ups get delayed, and owners lose visibility when it matters most.

agitations.one: Staff spend too long creating invoices while customers wait and queues build.
agitations.two: Stock mistakes create embarrassing misses, urgent calls, and lost revenue at the counter.
agitations.three: Missed follow-ups and unclear numbers make cash flow feel riskier than it should.

problem.lossDescription: Every manual delay creates more follow-up, more guesswork, and less confidence exactly when cash gets tight.
problem.solutionTitle: BillSutra fixes the mess in one place
problem.solutionDescription: Bring billing, stock, collections, reporting, and AI guidance into one operating system your team can actually use every day.
problem.solutionOne: Create invoices in seconds with live totals and GST-ready structure.
problem.solutionTwo: Track stock, payments, and customer balances from one connected workflow.
problem.solutionThree: Use clear dashboards to act early instead of reacting late.
problem.promiseDescription: BillSutra helps your team move faster, make fewer mistakes, and stay confident with every bill, stock update, and business decision.

features.trustedBy: Fast for staff. Clear for owners. Reliable every day.
features.title: Everything your business needs to bill, track, and scale
features.description: Each feature is designed to cut friction, create faster workflows, and make daily decisions feel obvious.

items.simpleBillingDescription: Create professional bills quickly with less typing, fewer mistakes, and faster checkout.
items.inventoryManagementDescription: Know what is in stock, what is moving fast, and what needs replenishment before it hurts sales.
items.analyticsDashboardDescription: See sales trends, pending payments, and business performance in a format owners can act on immediately.
items.gstInvoicesDescription: Generate clean, customer-ready invoices with the structure Indian businesses expect every day.
items.aiAssistantDescription: Ask simple business questions and get faster answers without digging through multiple screens.
items.secureReliableDescription: Keep billing data protected and operations dependable with a platform built for real business use.

preview.title: A real operating system for billing, stock, and decisions
preview.description: Your team can move from dashboard to billing to reports without losing context, speed, or control.
preview.surfaceTitle: Dashboard, billing, and reports in one flow
preview.dashboardDescription: A clear owner view of sales, collections, and stock pressure.
preview.dashboardPointOne: Quick metrics for revenue, receivables, and low stock
preview.dashboardPointTwo: A cleaner operating view for daily decisions
preview.billingDescription: Build bills faster with line items, tax totals, and payment capture in one flow.
preview.billingPointOne: Fast item search and quantity changes
preview.billingPointTwo: Clear totals before you hit print or share
preview.reportsDescription: See what is working, what is slowing you down, and where cash is getting stuck.
preview.reportsPointOne: Sales and payment trends without spreadsheet work
preview.reportsPointTwo: Sharper decisions for pricing, stock, and follow-ups
preview.pointOne: Keep billing, inventory, and follow-ups connected instead of scattered.
preview.pointTwo: Give staff a faster daily workflow without extra training burden.
preview.pointThree: Give owners clearer numbers before problems become expensive.

ai.title: Meet Your AI Business Assistant
ai.description: Ask business questions in plain language and get instant answers on profit, stock, receivables, and invoices without digging through dashboards.
ai.userQuestion: How much profit did we make this week, and what should I fix first?
ai.assistantAnswer: You're up 12.4% this week. The fastest win is to follow up on ₹94,500 in pending collections and reorder 6 fast-moving items before the weekend rush.
ai.typingLabel: BillSutra AI is preparing the next action
ai.inputPlaceholder: Ask about profit, stock, payments, or invoices...

capabilities.profitDescription: Ask for weekly profit, slow days, and top-performing products without opening multiple reports.
capabilities.stockTitle: Low-stock warnings before you lose sales
capabilities.stockDescription: Know exactly which fast-moving items need replenishment before shelves run dry.
capabilities.invoiceDescription: Let AI guide the next billing step, summarize dues, or point staff to the right workflow instantly.

howItWorks.title: Get started in three simple steps
howItWorks.description: No long setup project. Create your account, load products, and start billing on day one.

one.title: Create account
one.description: Set up your business, logo, and billing basics in a guided flow.

two.title: Add products
two.description: Upload or create products so your catalog is ready for fast billing.

three.title: Start billing
three.description: Generate invoices, capture payments, and track business activity from one place.

testimonials.title: Businesses trust BillSutra when billing speed and accuracy matter
testimonials.description: From retail counters to distributors, teams use BillSutra to work faster, recover cash sooner, and stay in control.

one.quote: BillSutra helped us move from scattered notebooks and spreadsheets to one dashboard where billing and stock finally stay aligned.
one.name: Priya Sharma

two.quote: Our sales team bills faster now because product data, pricing, and stock are all visible in the same workflow.
two.name: Aarav Mehta

three.quote: The interface is simple for staff, but the reports are strong enough for me to make weekly decisions with confidence.
three.name: Neha Verma

cta.title: Start managing your business smarter today
cta.description: Join businesses that want faster billing, better tracking, and clearer decisions without extra operational chaos.
cta.microNote: No credit card required. Start free today.

footer.description: BillSutra helps growing businesses run billing, inventory, and analytics from one bilingual workspace.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Ask direct questions about your latest business data and get instant answers.
assistant.introTitle: Ask live questions about sales, profit, pending payments, and cashflow
assistant.introDescription: The assistant checks your latest financial data for every query and answers in the same language you use.
assistant.chatDescription: Ask about profit, total sales, pending payments, and cashflow.
assistant.placeholder: Ask a question about your business...
assistant.thinking: Assistant is checking your latest data...
assistant.error: I could not fetch the latest answer right now. Please try again in a moment.
assistant.welcome: Hello! I can answer live questions using your Bill Sutra financial data. Ask me about profit, sales, pending payments, or cashflow.

quickPrompts.profit: What is my profit this month?
quickPrompts.pending: How much is pending in payments?
quickPrompts.cashflow: What is my cashflow this month?

assistantWidget.title: BillSutra Assistant
assistantWidget.subtitle: Ask about stock, sales, or bills
assistantWidget.welcome:
Hello!
I am your BillSutra assistant.

You can ask about:
- Stock
- Sales
- Restock suggestions

responses.noUrgentRestock: No urgent restock right now. Stock looks healthy.
responses.todaySales:
Today's sales are {amount}.
There are {count} sale entries today.
responses.topProduct:
{name} looks like your top selling product.
Total quantity sold: {count}.
responses.topProductEmpty: There is not enough sales data yet to find the top product.
responses.latestBill: Your latest bill is {number}. You can open it directly.
responses.latestBillEmpty: No bill found yet. Open invoices to create a new bill.
responses.fallback: I can help with stock, sales, restock, and bills. Try a quick chip or ask a short question.

dashboard.title: Welcome back, {name}.
dashboard.subtitle: A sharper view of sales, cash movement, profit trend, and inventory demand.

hero.operatingViewTitle: Revenue, receivables, supplier dues, and next actions in one operating view.
hero.operatingViewDescription: The dashboard now leads with what needs attention first, then steps through performance, forecasting, and records so the page is easier to scan on every screen size.

focus.title: Priority items
focus.description: Surface the tasks most likely to need action before you dive into the charts.

overview.title: Business pulse at a glance
overview.description: Primary KPIs are grouped together first so revenue, spend, collections, and payables can be compared without hunting through the page.

profit.title: How profitability is moving over time
profit.description: Profit cards are separated from operational balances to reduce cognitive load and make period-over-period changes easier to read.

performance.title: Revenue, cash, and payment mix
performance.description: Charts are grouped by financial story so users can move from booked activity to actual cash movement and then to payment behavior.

forecasting.title: Demand, inventory, and forward-looking signals
forecasting.description: Forecast widgets sit together with product demand and risk alerts so replenishment decisions can be made from one area.

operations.title: Alerts, billing health, and collection queue
operations.description: Action-oriented cards are grouped ahead of supporting insight panels so the dashboard helps users decide what to do next, not just what happened.

records.title: Transactions and recent invoice history
records.description: Dense data views are pushed toward the end of the page and paired with direct navigation, which keeps the main dashboard focused while still making detail accessible.

primaryMetrics.totalSalesDescription: Paid direct sales and invoice collections combined for the selected range.
primaryMetrics.totalSalesHelper: Direct sales exclude invoice-synced entries; invoice payments are merged with paid fallback handling to avoid duplicates.
primaryMetrics.totalPurchasesDescription: Spend committed to stock and supply purchases.
primaryMetrics.totalPurchasesHelper: Sum of purchase total_amount (fallback total) for the selected range.
primaryMetrics.pendingSalesPaymentsDescription: Outstanding customer payments still to collect.
primaryMetrics.pendingSalesPaymentsHelper: Sum of pending_amount on sales in the selected range.
primaryMetrics.pendingPurchasePaymentsDescription: Outstanding supplier payments for recorded purchases.
primaryMetrics.pendingPurchasePaymentsHelper: Sum of pending_amount on purchases in the selected range.

profitMetrics.todayDescription: Today's net after purchases and expenses.
profitMetrics.weeklyHelper: (Sales - purchases - expenses) over the last 7 days.
profitMetrics.monthlyDescription: Current month profit after all outflows.
profitMetrics.yearlyDescription: Year-to-date profit after purchases and expenses.

operations.invoiceStatisticsDescription: Keep invoice totals, pending items, and overdue follow-ups visible without opening the records page.
operations.collectionQueueDescription: The highest pending balances are surfaced first so collection work stays short and targeted.

records.recentInvoiceHistoryDescription: Recent invoices are sorted by date and trimmed to the latest five so the dashboard stays readable.

cashflow.title: Cash flow summary
cashflow.description: Current-month collections versus outgoing purchase payments and expenses.
cashflow.empty: No cash flow activity recorded for this period yet.
cashflow.footnote: Includes direct sale receipts, invoice collections, paid purchase amounts, and recorded expenses.

paymentMethods.sectionDescription: Breakdown of paid sales and purchases by payment type.
paymentMethods.salesEmpty: No recorded sale payments in this period.
paymentMethods.purchasesEmpty: No recorded purchase payments in this period.
paymentMethods.loadError: Unable to load payment method data.

salesChart.title: Sales and purchase analytics
salesChart.description: Compare booked sales against purchase activity to spot demand bursts and stocking pressure.
salesChart.balanceDescription: Monthly sales and purchase movement across the latest six months.
salesChart.categoryMixDescription: Top categories ranked by booked sales value.

analyticsPanel.title: Sales trend and cash pressure
analyticsPanel.description: Switch between short and long ranges to compare customer demand against purchase pressure.
analyticsPanel.smartInsightInventory: {count} low-stock item(s) are nearing reorder levels. Prioritize replenishment before the next billing push.
analyticsPanel.smartInsightCollections: {count} overdue invoice(s) and {amount} in pending collections need follow-up this week.
analyticsPanel.smartInsightSupplier: {count} supplier payable reminder(s) are active with {amount} still due.
analyticsPanel.smartInsightHealthy: Collections and inventory are stable. Use this window to push higher-margin products.

profitForecast.title: Profit analytics
profitForecast.description: Revenue, operating cost, and net profit across the latest six-month window.

salesForecast.receiptsDescription: Monthly sales forecast uses real cash receipts from paid sales and invoice collections.
salesForecast.title: Sales forecast
salesForecast.description: Historical sales against projected movement for the selected period.

quickActions.title: Quick actions

notifications.title: Notifications & alerts

ledger.title: Customer khata
ledger.historyDescription: Every invoice and payment updates the running balance automatically.

ledger.emptyDescription: You will see every bill, payment, and running balance in one place.

invoiceComposer.keyboardCheckout: {key}+S also completes the bill from the keyboard.

invoiceComposer.shortcutEnter: Add the scanned or searched product to the bill
invoiceComposer.shortcutNote: Note: on this billing screen, {saveKey} and {productKey} override the browser defaults so the billing flow stays uninterrupted.
invoiceComposer.quickProductDescription: Create a missing product and drop it straight into the bill.
